summary: All 3 steps completed. The executable='/bin/bash' fix was already present in verify.py (commit 503b9d7). Temporarily reverted fix to validate tests fail under dash (TDD discipline confirmed — both mock and integration tests fail without the fix). Created orchestrator/tests/test_verify.py with 12 tests covering: bash executable parameter (mock + integration), timeout handling, error handling, cwd forwarding, and run_verification result assembly (all-pass, single failures, multiple failures). All 12 tests pass.
